items.title: Desert & Extreme Heat
items.desc: Operates without climate control in conditions that require active cooling for lithium.

items.image_alt: CEES™ battery storage units able to operate in arctic storm surge conditions well below freezing temperatures
items.title: Arctic & Sub-Zero
items.desc: Full performance at temperatures that shut down lithium-ion entirely.

items.image_alt: CEES™ battery storage units deployed at a remote mountain outpost
items.title: Mountain & High Altitude
items.desc: Reliable energy storage for remote installations where maintenance access is limited and conditions are harsh.

items.image_alt: CEES™ battery storage units deployed in a coastal flood zone
items.title: Coastal & Flood Zone
items.desc: Non-flammable, flood-survivable energy storage for hurricane corridors and island infrastructure.

meta.title: Advanced Battery Concepts | Critical Infrastructure Energy Storage
meta.description: Advanced bipolar lead battery technology built for the hardest environments on Earth. Non-flammable. No HVAC required. Operating range -40 to 55 degrees Celsius. Made in Michigan.
meta.og_title: Advanced Battery Concepts | Critical Infrastructure Energy Storage
meta.og_description: Non-flammable bipolar lead battery technology for extreme environments. -40 to 55 degrees Celsius. No HVAC. Zero thermal runaway.

comparison.label: Head-to-Head
comparison.title: ABC vs. Lithium-Ion: 20-Year Total Cost
comparison.desc: When you evaluate energy storage for critical infrastructure, the comparison is clear.

rows.abc: Lower: no HVAC, no fire suppression

microgrid.image_alt: ABC BoxBe containers powering a solar microgrid in the Australian outback
microgrid.label: Microgrid Ready
microgrid.title: The Foundation for Off-Grid Power
microgrid.desc: ABC energy storage paired with solar provides reliable, non-flammable backup for remote outposts, island communities, and distributed infrastructure. No HVAC. No fire suppression. Just power.

deployments.label: Scalable Deployment
deployments.title: One Modular Unit. Three Ways to Deploy.
deployments.desc: The CEES™ 48 kWh cartridge is ABC's core building block. Depending on project scale, it deploys in outdoor-rated enclosures for small installations, BoxBe ISO containers for mid-range projects, or constructed Battery Barn facilities for utility-scale storage.

items.title: Direct Deployment
items.desc: Outdoor-rated NEMA3R/IP55 enclosures linked to wall-mounted inverters. Ideal for remote sites, microgrids, and island infrastructure. As deployed at Manitou Islands National Park.

items.title: Containerized Storage
items.desc: 10-foot ISO containers (384 kWh) or 20-foot ISO containers (768 kWh). Pre-integrated, pre-tested, transportable by standard flatbed. Deploy in weeks, not months.

items.title: Utility-Scale Facility
items.desc: Purpose-built warehouse housing 432 CEES™ cartridges. 5 MW / 20 MWh in 6,000 square feet. No HVAC. No fire suppression. Where lithium needs 3 to 5 acres, ABC fits in a single building.

cta.label: Get Started
cta.title: Your Project Deserves Better Than Lithium
cta.desc: Whether you are deploying in a flood zone, an arctic outpost, or a sensitive municipal site, we will show you why ABC is the right technology for hard projects.

hero.image_alt: ABC BoxBe containers and CEES™ units deployed along a cold Lake Superior coastline at dusk
hero.label: Advanced Bipolar Lead Technology
hero.subtitle: Non-flammable energy storage that operates from -40 to 55 degrees Celsius without HVAC. Zero thermal runaway. Zero fire risk. 15-year daily cycle life warranty. Designed for critical infrastructure where failure is not an option.
hero.title: Built for the Hardest Environments on Earth
